parties.name: LOMAX, MARILYN MARIE 1478 REVERE AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marilyn Lomax appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Lomax stated that her mother has not filed anything about the correct date of birth, that her mother is 81 years of age, that they just discovered this when applying for a passport and that her mother orally confirmed the date of birth. The court stated that it is willing to accept the representation. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
